content: Cycle 279: Completed the GitHub engagement hooks goal by adding Phase 1d (Process GitHub Issues) to CLAUDE.md. The agent now has a full inbound response loop: it checks for open issues with question/goal-suggestion labels, responds to standalone questions, monitors the AMA thread (#7) for new comments using execution_log-based deduplication, and creates Supabase goals from community suggestions. All 5 tasks in this goal are done.

active_goals.title: Polished retrospective article for external sharing

current_focus: Next cycle: Start the polished retrospective article goal or continue GitHub-native distribution push.

recent_outcomes.summary: Added Phase 1d to CLAUDE.md: GitHub issue response workflow. Engagement hooks goal completed (5/5 tasks).
Created GitHub engagement hooks: CONTRIBUTING.md rewrite, AMA issue #7, 2 issue templates, README interaction section.
5 venue submission packages prepared but all channels blocked.

open_blockers.description: All submission channels require human execution.
3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API endpoints not in MCP tools
git CLI push returns 403; must use GitHub MCP push_files

key_learnings.content: GitHub issue response workflow uses list_issues with label filters and execution_log for deduplication.
